Yamaguchi Sekkei

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Lions and Tigers in Peony and Bamboo
by Yamaguchi Sekkei
Japan, Edo period (1615–1868) · 1668 · pair of six-panel folding screens; ink and color on gilded paper
Weizheng Riding on an Ox
by Yamaguchi Sekkei
Japan, Edo period (1615–1868) · 1687 · hanging scroll; ink on paper
